chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Spl. STRA No.116 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 04.02.2025 ************ None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Same was position on the last date of hearing viz. 10.12.2024 and following order was passed_ “None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received, whereas, perusal of the proposed questions apparently reflects that this matter has been decided by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan. Applicant’s Counsel is directed to come prepared and assist this Court on the next date. Adjourned to 04.02.2025. Office to issue intimation notice to Applicant’s Counsel.” In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
